creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Since update of databases/sqlite-3.7.7 subversion doesn't work anymore. Every commit is quit with

Transmitting file data ..svn: Commit failed (details follow):
svn: Couldn't perform atomic initialization
svn: database schema has changed
svn: Your commit message was left in a temporary file:


It seems to be a bug in sqlite-3.7.7-1 (Bug #631736) which has been fixed in sqlite-3.7.7-2.

See http://www.mail-archive.com/debian-bugs-closed@lists.debian.org/msg328104.html for some informations.

Fix: 

This bug obviously seems to be reported as fixed in sqlite-3.7.7-2. Couldn't confirm.
How-To-Repeat: Perform recent regular update via portmaster/portupgrade and watch your log when commiting code to your subversion system.
